question: Show all customer ids without an order.
sql: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders)

filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示所有没有订单的客户ID，SQL反向翻译描述通过NOT IN子查询正确表达了这一逻辑，且未涉及聚合、分组、排序或限制条件，与原始问题完全匹配。
